meaning: 鄂木斯克[苏联西伯利亚西部城市]
examples: By the winter of 1984, Kostya was the middleweight champion of Omsk.
On the train back to Omsk, Emil admonished Kostya for showing too much sympathy.
The extraordinary creation is the latest by Anatoly Konenko, from Omsk, in Russia.
He also built a new training centre and arena for the Avangard Omsk ice hockey team.
The governor of Omsk, in western Siberia, has banned the sale of food to other regions.
